'''Zark Squadron''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|Clawcraft]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that participated in the [[Battle of Tenupe]] during the [[Swarm War]]. The squadron was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jagged Fel]] and engaged in battle with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Joiner]]s [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Zekk]].<ref name="Swarm War" />

{{Chiss-stub}}
